title: New to monday.com

posts.author: whetu (Whetu Paitai)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

We are looking for some one to walk us through an initial setup and show us best practice for a small 3 person team that engages with external contractors.

We have been using a collection of Google Docs, Discord, and Emailing in the past, and feel it is time to upgrade to some sort of management platform to help us plan and create better.

We would be looking at creating boards for our weekly business tasks, ongoing creative projects, and one of solution based projects.

We are based in Aotearoa (New Zealand).

Thank you.

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @whetu

Thanks for writing in here and welcome to the community!

If you have questions about setup, we’d suggest firstly attending a basic walkthrough webinar which you can book here if you haven’t attended already.

Then, if you need more advice, you can write to us at support@monday.com or check out our Knowledge Base at support.monday.com for articles on every feature and some best practice guides.

We’re here to help
